summary: Tested full-text search with relevance scoring feature for product catalog. Backend APIs and frontend auto-switch behaviors working correctly.

minor.issue: name_desc sort not strictly alphabetical due to case-sensitivity/special characters - products with lowercase names mixed with uppercase

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for catalog
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 217 products including 9 Sonos products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full-text search with relevance scoring is working. MongoDB text index with weights (name:10, brand:5, sub_category:3, category:3, description:1) correctly ranks search results. Frontend auto-switches to Relevance sort when typing search and reverts to Name A-Z when cleared. Relevance option only visible in dropdown when search term is active.

backend: GET /api/catalog/products?search=sonos&sort=relevance - returns 9 Sonos products ranked by relevance ✓
GET /api/catalog/products?search=speaker+audio&sort=relevance - multi-term search with relevance scoring ✓
GET /api/catalog/products?search=sono&sort=relevance - partial word regex fallback working ✓
GET /api/catalog/products?sort=relevance (no search) - correctly falls back to name_asc ✓
Basic catalog operations (categories, brands, pagination) - all working ✓
frontend: Auto-switch to Relevance sort when typing in search input ✓
Revert to Name A-Z when clearing search ✓
Relevance option hidden in dropdown without search term ✓
Relevance option visible when search term is active ✓
Product catalog browsing without search works correctly ✓
